flags.reason: Deploy SA has roles/storage.admin at project level, granting full control over all GCS buckets in the project.
flags.suggested_fix: Scope to roles/storage.objectAdmin on specific buckets if deploy only needs to upload pipeline archives.

flags.reason: Cross-project BigQuery access to api-project-178709533099 is via credential files in Secret Manager, not Terraform-managed IAM. The actual permissions granted by the SA key are not visible in the Terraform state.
flags.suggested_fix: Migrate to cross-project IAM (commented-out resources in clients.tf) to bring BQ access under Terraform management and make permissions auditable.

flags.reason: Cross-project BigQuery access to paternitylab is via credential files in Secret Manager, not Terraform-managed IAM.
flags.suggested_fix: Migrate to cross-project IAM (commented-out resources in clients.tf) to bring BQ access under Terraform management.

flags.reason: Engine SA has roles/storage.objectAdmin which includes delete permissions. If the engine only reads pipeline archives and writes backups, objectCreator+objectViewer may suffice.
flags.suggested_fix: Evaluate whether the engine deletes objects from GCS. If not, downgrade to roles/storage.objectViewer + roles/storage.objectCreator.
